role: Speaker of Parliament (1989–1992, 2000–2004); Green Movement leader
bio: Mehdi Karroubi served as Speaker of the [Islamic Consultative Assembly](/orgs/islamic-consultative-assembly) twice. A presidential candidate in 2009, he refused to accept the disputed official results and became a co-leader of the [Green Movement](/events/green-movement-protests-2009) alongside [Mir-Hossein Mousavi](/people/mir-hossein-mousavi). He has been held under house arrest in Tehran since February 2011 without trial, one of the most prominent political detainees in the Islamic Republic.
editorial_notes: Under house arrest since February 2011. Co-founder of the National Trust Party (2005).
